channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Dick Button, Olympic great and voice of skating, dies at 95
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Dick Button was more than the most accomplished men’s figure skater in history. He was one of his sport’s great innovators and promoters, the man responsible not only for inventing the flying camel spin but describing it to generations of fans.
item.dc:creator: BARRY WILNER and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Local pro bull rider representing Navajo Nation
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Pro Bull Riders Tour is coming back to Salt Lake City next weekend for the Unleash the Beats event at the Delta Center. At this level, the relationship between bull rider and bull has to be in sync, like a wild dance.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: New Raiders coach Pete Carroll retains defensive coordinator Patrick Graham, AP source says
item.description: A person with knowledge of the decision says new Las Vegas Raiders coach Pete Carroll has retained defensive coordinator Patrick Graham.
item.dc:creator: Mark Anderson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Wichita’s Sam Stevens overcomes plane-crash sorrow, opens strong at Pebble Beach Pro-Am
item.description: Sam Stevens opened the AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am by remarkably shooting 5-under 67 and trying not to worry about that plane from his hometown of Wichita, Kansas that ultimately crashed near Washington D.C.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Max Scherzer agrees to a $15.5 million, 1-year contract with the Toronto Blue Jays, AP source says
item.description: Max Scherzer is joining the Toronto Blue Jays, agreeing to a 15.5 million, one-year contract on Thursday, according to a person with direct knowledge of the deal. The person spoke to the AP on condition of anonymity because the agreement had not been announced and was pending a physical.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A Lim Kim opens 4-shot lead in 1st round of LPGA season opener
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — A Lim Kim shot a bogey-free, 7-under 65 on Thursday to take a four-shot lead in the opening round of the Hilton Grand Vacations Tournament of Champions, the LGPA Tour season opener. The 29-year-old Kim, a two-time winner on tour including the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Why Sharks GM Mike Grier might be on edge during 4 Nations Face-Off
item.description: NHL: San Jose Sharks center Mikael Granlund was named an assistant captain for Finland's 4 Nations Face-Off team
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Eagles star Brandon Graham has chance to play in Super Bowl LIX after injury derailed season
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles opened Brandon Graham's practice window, giving the star defensive end a chance to return for the Super Bowl against the Chiefs.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: McDonald's announces Angel Reese Special, set to debut in February
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Angel Reese is set to add another first to her list of celebrity endorsements and accomplishments. In a post on X, fast food mega-chain McDonald's announced "The Angel Reese Special," will debut on Feb. 10 in collaboration with the Chicago Sky's star power forward.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: ESPN exercises option extending media base-rights agreement with the ACC through 2035-36
item.description: ESPN has exercised its option to extend a base-rights media deal with the Atlantic Coast Conference through 2035-36, aligning the timeline with a second deal that covers their partnership for the ACC Network.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Super Bowl 2025: Time, channel, halftime show, how to watch Chiefs vs. Eagles livestream
item.description: Kansas City's quest to become the first team to win three consecutive Super Bowls is a go. The Philadelphia Eagles are the last team standing that could stop them. Quarterback Patrick Mahomes and the Chiefs are back in the NFL title game — which will be on Feb.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What to know about the 50th Charlie Wedemeyer Santa Clara County all-star football game
item.description: SJSU football coach Ken Niumatalolo was the keynote speaker at the annual banquet held in honor of the late Los Gatos coach who fought ALS.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Caitlin Clark and Fever will play exhibition against Brazilian National Team at Iowa
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Caitlin Clark and the Indiana Fever will be playing the Brazilian National Team this WNBA preseason at the University of Iowa. The Fever announced the addition to their preseason schedule Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Strength-sapping defense fuels No. 6 Houston's 13-game winning streak
item.description: MORGANTOWN, W.Va. (AP) — West Virginia’s Javon Small gestured and yelled for a teammate — any teammate — to get open closer to the basket. When that didn’t work, the Big 12's leading scorer forced up a 3-pointer just before the shot clock expired. Clank. Small was the latest star stifled by No.
item.dc:creator: JOHN RABY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: White Sox release 2025 promotional schedule
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have announced their promotions schedule for the 2025 MLB season, including limited-edition items and a first-ever Sunday Bobblehead Collector’s Series, to commemorate the 125-year anniversary of the team's founding.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Bears hiring Declan Doyle as offensive coordinator
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — On the same evening the Chicago Bears are reportedly hiring their next defensive coordinator, the Bears have also committed to a new offensive coordinator under first-year head coach Ben Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego Padres announce 2025 theme game schedule and giveaways
item.description: The San Diego Padres have unveiled their 2025 promotional schedule, featuring a variety of exciting giveaways, theme games and fan events throughout the season.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Kucherov scores in OT to give Lightning 4-3 win over Blackhawks
item.description: Nikita Kucherov scored 58 seconds into overtime and had two assists as the Tampa Bay Lightning beat the Chicago Blackhawks 4-3 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
